description: Cloud Spanner is Google Cloud’s distributed relational database service. It provides managed database instances, databases, schema, and data operations for Spanner workloads.
summary: spanner.googleapis.com exposes a Cloud Spanner REST API at `https://spanner.googleapis.com` authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens, plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://spanner.googleapis.com/mcp`.
